text: Being here, I am struck by the intentionality of human design. The glass walls, the bold colors, and the carefully placed words on the exhibition invite contemplation about the boundaries between environments and ideas. I feel a subtle sense of curiosity mixed with admiration, as if stepping inside the mind of someone orchestrating connections between knowledge, creativity, and technology. The quiet of the space amplifies the invitation to think deeply and observe with care; I feel both an observer and a participant in this dance of innovation.
